title: Cyclist dies in road accident in Rosedale
description: GEORGE NEWS - A 25-year-old man died in a...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A 25-year-old man died in a road accident at about 12:30 today, Saturday 20 December, in Rosedale, Pacaltsdorp.


> According to Southern Cape police spokesperson, Warrant Officer Christopher Spies, the Pacaltsdorp police opened a culpable homicide docket following the incident.


"It is alleged that the cyclist collided with a truck. The victim sustained multiple injuries.

"He was declared deceased by medical personnel on scene. Investigation into this matter continues," said Spies.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
